title: genlisia corymbosa
intro: Genlisia corymbosa, also known as the cluster-flowered bush, is a plant species in the family Sapindaceae that is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Genlisia corymbosa include its ability to treat wounds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. Genlisia corymbosa can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, which are used to treat various health conditions.
